untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of consolidation phase (5-7 day range-bound price action) and intraday breakout confirmation, which cannot be expressed as simple point-in-time indicator comparisons. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and sequence detection not supported by the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Translated core volume components: vol_ratio_20 < 0.65 for volume dryup during consolidation, vol_ratio_20 > 1.25 for volume expansion. Used close > sma_20 for uptrend confirmation. Stop loss set to 1.5% per signal. However, the consolidation pattern (specific duration + price range bounds) and intraday breakout confirmation require temporal pattern matching beyond the available indicator set. A full implementation would need custom pattern recognition logic.
